title: my link with people rebuild 10 subs
display_title: my link with people rebuild 10 subs
wikitext:
[]: my link with people?-rebuild 1.0 subs             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:34 pm I saw a few hours ago rebuild 1.0 in the cinema for the first time. I pretty much knew anything they were going to say but still it was enjoyable just seeing eva on the bigscreen. anyyyway, I noticed something was a bit off in the subtitles. As in, crucial/important lines were phrased..differently. At first I noticed this when Shinji said his infamous "I mustn't run away!" line, or more accurately, when he was supposed to say it. Instead we got "I wont run away!". I know its the same meaning and all, but c'mon! Then in the fight with shamsel instead of Misato calling Shinji an idiot for concealing the angel with smoke and whatnot, she just doesn't. Not that i know any bit of Japanese, but I'm *pretty* sure "baka" means idiot. Then when he asks Rei why she pilots her eva, she says, "its my link with people"; besides the fact bond is just a better word for it, That Isn't what shes supposed to say Where was my bond Rei? where was it?! Anyone know if like.. They also saw a version of the movie with these mistakes? Or know of a version of the film where these mistakes were present. I'm rather curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Oct 08, 2009 10:37 pm Heres your Bond Rei:

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Oct 09, 2009 2:54 am Hawt. Does she also have her way with all of the women in the show? (Shinji would probably have a better chance with Rei Bond!...)

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Oct 09, 2009 2:58 am @Faz: Let me guess, Pierce Brosnan? @Topic: The bond may be the fact that she's the vessel of Lilith's soul. Just guessing.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:03 am hmm? I'm not sure I get what you meant. I meant simply that its a better choice of words to use "bond" (like she did in the shows subs..) and this time they had her say "link" Unless you mean she isn't saying "bond" because this time around she isn't Lilith's soul vessel. Or something.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:22 am I think that "bond" and "link" do posses the same meaning. If used in Rei's context, it could be. It's just that your ear and my ear got used to the word "bond" for that line. as for the lilith vessel thinggy, I am not quite sure myself. haha.
